title: Secrets, Dependencies, Static Analysis, and Supply Chain · Policy Clinic: Secret Scanning
summary: Build layered security gates for source, dependencies, workflows, and releases. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates secret scanning increment in a secure-development gate stack. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Prevent, detect, revoke, and remediate committed credentials and sensitive files.
Pair coverage gaps with mutation, defect, and risk evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

steps.title: Build Secret Scanning evidence
steps.instruction: Append a gates-secret-scanning-khc52i: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Secret Scanning into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
gates-secret-scanning-khc52i:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
